scripts.smoke:ci: pnpm -r build && node packages/cli/dist/main.js --help && node scripts/smoke-test.mjs
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm smoke:ci
scripts.playbook:diagram: pnpm --filter playbook... run build && pnpm --filter playbook exec node dist/main.js diagram --repo . --out docs/ARCHITECTURE_DIAGRAMS.md
